transcript: Here's Jessica. Jessica is in high school and is running for class president. Before the election, Jessica wants to see how she stands to find out what her chances are of winning. The problem is her class is 500 people and asking everyone will be too much work. So what's the alternative? Instead, Jessica decides to poll a sample of students to at least get an idea of the percentage of students that would vote for her. It's not a perfect solution, but it's much easier. Similarly, an index is a sample of stocks that provide...
